title: Crispy Malaysian Fish Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Malaysian-inspired fish curry featuring crispy fried fish in a rich and creamy curry sauce, perfect for a monsoon evening. This pescatarian-friendly dish combines the warmth of spices with the comfort of whole milk.
instructions: Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Fry the fish pieces until crispy and golden brown, then set aside.
In the same pan, add more oil if needed, then sauté the cumin seeds until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, sauté until the raw smell disappears.
Add the curry powder and turmeric, stir well to combine.
Pour in the whole milk, stir constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low.
Add the fried fish pieces back into the curry sauce, braise for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and lemon juice to taste.
Serve the crispy fish curry hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
